summary: Surah As-Saff urges believers to act upon what they preach and not to be hypocritical. It praises those who strive in Allah’s cause with discipline and unity, and mentions the messages of Moses and Jesus, including the prophecy of the coming of Prophet Muhammad ('Ahmed'). The surah warns against opposing Allah and his Messenger, and encourages faith, sacrifice, and support for Allah’s religion, promising forgiveness, Paradise, and victory for the believers.
